_meta.title: Morgan Keller — Custom JSON-LD Schema Payloads
_meta.author: Apollo Marketing
_meta.instructions: Each payload below targets a specific page or page-type on morgankeller.com. Drop each payload inside a <script type="application/ld+json">…</script> tag in the <head> of the corresponding page. Validate after deployment via search.google.com/test/rich-results before assuming SERP feature eligibility.
notes: All payloads use schema.org vocabulary version current as of 2026-04-25.

Phone number (301-663-0626), corporate office address, and Richmond office sourced from the live morgankeller.com website. Verify with Morgan Keller before publish — Apollo did not contact MK directly.
Founder/year (1955) sourced from the live About page meta description.

The FAQPage payload's questions are extracted from Google's 'People also ask' for related queries. Answers are drafted as starting points; Morgan Keller should review and adjust voice/specificity before publishing.
deployment_priority: 1. Organization (homepage) — highest impact, single deploy, eligible for Knowledge Panel
2. Service (each service page) — 7 deploys, supports SERP service-feature eligibility
4. FAQPage (homepage or selected service page) — FAQ rich card eligibility
5. Person (About page or each leader bio) — author/expertise EEAT signal
6. CreativeWork / Project (case study / project pages) — when project pages get built

schema.name: Morgan-Keller Construction
schema.description: Privately held general contracting and construction management firm serving the Mid-Atlantic region from offices in Frederick, MD and Richmond, VA. Established 1955.
schema.slogan: Our Reputation Is Building Every Day

memberOf.name: Associated Builders and Contractors (ABC) — Cumberland Valley Chapter

award: ABC Cumberland Valley Excellence in Construction Awards (multiple years)
Builder of the Year (Orchard Park, Ballenger Run)
ASCC 2017 Safety Award (MK Concrete Construction subsidiary)

schema.name: Preconstruction Services
schema.description: Preconstruction services include conceptual estimating, value engineering, constructability review, scheduling, and subcontractor procurement. Morgan Keller works directly with the Owner, Design Team, and key subcontractors to plan and price the project before construction begins.

schema.name: General Contracting
schema.description: General contracting for commercial, multi-family, healthcare, educational, and institutional projects across the Mid-Atlantic. Morgan-Keller has completed hundreds of projects spanning nearly every type of construction.

schema.name: Construction Management
schema.description: Construction management services where Morgan-Keller acts as the Owner's representative, coordinating design and construction across the project lifecycle. Suitable for healthcare, education, multi-family, and complex commercial projects.

schema.name: Design-Build
schema.description: Design-build delivery method where Morgan-Keller takes overall responsibility for both the design and construction of a project — one of the most practical means of construction for cost and schedule certainty.

schema.name: Concrete Construction
schema.description: Concrete construction services delivered through MK Concrete Construction, recipient of the ASCC 2017 Safety Award and recognized for ACI-certified team members. Specializes in commercial slab, foundation, and structural concrete work.

schema.name: Sustainable Construction
schema.description: Sustainable construction services including LEED-conscious design integration, energy-efficient building systems, and environmentally responsible material sourcing across commercial and institutional projects.

schema.name: Facilities Maintenance
schema.description: Commercial facilities maintenance services delivered through MK Commercial Facilities Maintenance subsidiary. Ongoing service relationships for corporate, retail, and institutional clients.

breadcrumb_template_service_pages.deploy_to_url: Use on each /services/* page — adjust serviceName + serviceUrl per page

faq_homepage_payload.instructions: Questions sourced from Google 'People also ask' for commercial construction frederick md and adjacent queries. Morgan Keller should review answers and add specificity where possible (years in business, project counts, past clients) before publishing.

mainEntity.name: What does a commercial general contractor do in Frederick, MD?

acceptedAnswer.text: A commercial general contractor manages the construction of commercial buildings — coordinating subcontractors, scheduling, materials, permits, and quality on behalf of the project owner. Morgan-Keller Construction has served as a commercial general contractor in Frederick, MD since 1955, completing projects across multi-family, healthcare, educational, and institutional markets.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between general contracting and construction management?

acceptedAnswer.text: Under general contracting, the contractor takes on the construction work after design is complete, typically for a fixed price. Under construction management, the contractor joins the project earlier — often during preconstruction — and serves as the owner's representative across both design and construction phases. Morgan-Keller offers both delivery methods.

mainEntity.name: What types of projects does Morgan-Keller Construction build?

acceptedAnswer.text: Morgan-Keller Construction builds commercial, multi-family, healthcare, educational, religious, and institutional projects throughout Maryland, Virginia, Pennsylvania, and West Virginia. Recent project types include senior housing, multifamily apartments, medical office buildings, performing arts centers, business parks, and concrete construction.

mainEntity.name: How long has Morgan-Keller been in business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Morgan-Keller Construction was established in 1955 and has been delivering construction services across the Mid-Atlantic for over six decades. The firm is privately held and headquartered in Frederick, Maryland with an additional office in Richmond, Virginia.

Design-build is a project delivery method where a single firm takes responsibility for both designing and constructing a project. This approach typically reduces schedule, simplifies communication, and creates earlier cost certainty compared to the traditional design-bid-build approach. Morgan-Keller offers design-build delivery across its commercial and institutional project markets.

person_template_team_member.deploy_to_url: Use on each leadership / team-member page — replace placeholder fields
person_template_team_member.instructions: Apply per team member with a public bio. Examples on morgankeller.com homepage: Mark Remaklus, Scott Armiger, Dennis Hunter, Joe Wasilewski. Job titles + bios should be confirmed before publish.

schema_template.name: {REPLACE: Full Name}
schema_template.jobTitle: {REPLACE: Job Title — e.g., Vice President of Preconstruction}

creative_work_project_template.deploy_to_url: Use on each project / case-study page once Morgan-Keller builds dedicated project pages (currently they only exist as news posts)
creative_work_project_template.instructions: Project provenance is one of the strongest EEAT signals MK can deploy. The /news/ section already contains 100+ project mentions; converting selected ones into dedicated /projects/{slug} pages with this schema would compound the SEO advantage.

schema_template.name: {REPLACE: Project Name}
schema_template.description: {REPLACE: One-sentence project description with project type, square footage if known, and notable attributes}

candidate_projects_from_news_section_for: 112 Thomas Johnson Drive medical office (Frederick MD)
